import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'; import './Contact.css'; export default function Contact() { const ref = useRef(null); const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', email: '', type: '', budget: '', message: '' }); useEffect(() => { const obs = new IntersectionObserver(([e]) => { if (e.isIntersecting) ref.current.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(r => r.classList.add('visible')); }, { threshold: 0.1 }); obs.observe(ref.current); return () => obs.disconnect(); }, []); const set = (k) => (e) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [k]: e.target.value })); return (
{/* Left */}
